articles.title: 77" Samsung 4K OLED TV for $1,098!

articles.title: NVIDIA's Blackwell-Next in Linux Kernel
articles.description: NVIDIA is preparing Linux support for its upcoming Blackwell-Next hardware, indicating future advancements in GPU technology. Stay informed!

articles.title: High-Demand Vintage Audio Gear
articles.description: Vintage audio gear like Marantz receivers and JBL speakers are in high demand, fetching impressive resale prices in 2026. Collectors take note!
articles.impact: The vintage audio market continues to thrive.

articles.title: Valve's Dota 2 Variable Mocks Dataminers
articles.description: Valve introduces a new Dota 2 variable that humorously targets dataminers searching for Half-Life 3 clues. A clever move!
articles.impact: Valve's humor engages the gaming community.

articles.title: Apple's Upcoming Product Lineup Revealed

articles.title: Corvette's Convertible History Explained
articles.description: The Corvette was only available as a coupe from 1975 to 1986, with another gap from 1997 to 1998. Learn more about its history!

articles.title: Intel Core 3 304 Nears Apple A18 Pro
articles.description: Intel's Core 3 304 scores closely to Apple's A18 Pro in PassMark tests, indicating competitive performance in entry-level CPUs. Check it out!
